headline: RISING STAR
title: Beautiful downloads, no terminal required.
subtitle: Macabolic wraps yt-dlp in a gorgeous native macOS GUI — grab videos and audio from YouTube and thousands of sites with SponsorBlock, subtitle, and playlist support all built in. Power-user features, zero command-line fuss.

headline: EDITOR'S PICK
title: Your desktop, alive and in motion.
subtitle: Wallnetic brings GPU-accelerated live video wallpapers to macOS with per-display settings and smart battery management. Your screen finally deserves more than a static image.

headline: HIDDEN GEM
title: Client feedback that lands with precision.
subtitle: ReviseFlow lets clients click and annotate directly on your live website — every revision arrives pinned to exact pixels with full technical context. Say goodbye to long email threads and misunderstood change requests.

headline: JUST SHIPPED
title: Share secrets without leaving a trace.
subtitle: SecretDrop turns sensitive passwords, API keys, and private notes into self-destructing links — readable once, then gone forever. No account, no plain-text storage, no trace left behind.
